chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Spl. Cr. Appeal No.D-34 of 2023 Spl. Cr. Jail Appeal No.D-36 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For orders on MA No.584/2023 3. For hearing of MA No.585/2023 4. For hearing of main case 22-02-2024 Mr. Rukhsar Ahmed Junejo, Advocate for the Appellant Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the appellant submits that he does not press the Jail Appeal on behalf of the appellant as subsequently he has filed Spl. Cr. Appeal No.D-34 of 2023, against the same judgment which has been admitted and fixed for regular hearing. In view of above, Spl. Cr. Jail Appeal No.D-36 of 2023 is dismissed as not pressed. To come up on 27.03.2024. Office is directed to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
